Thoughtful features

Components and patterns focused on clarity, performance, and accessibility—so users can get things done quickly.

Fast & performant

Lightweight assets and sensible defaults reduce load times for every user.

Privacy-first

Minimal telemetry and predictable data flows for easier compliance.

Responsive design

Built mobile-first with fluid layouts that look great on any device.

Refined UI

Clear hierarchy, consistent spacing, and subtle motion ensure a pleasant experience.

Transparent plans designed for teams of all sizes.
